data.title: As a developer, brainstorm completion gates plan mode entry via sentinel and PreToolUse hook
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Core enforcement mechanism — brainstorm writes a sentinel file upon Phase 3 completion, and a new PreToolUse hook blocks EnterPlanMode when no sentinel exists.
**Why**: Without a hard gate, Claude can skip brainstorm and enter plan mode with under-specified feature ideas, leading to backtracking.
**Scope**:
- IN: PreToolUse hook for EnterPlanMode, sentinel file write in brainstorm Phase 3, hook registration in plugin.json, new dispatcher
- OUT: Allowlist bypass (Story 2), feature-intent detection guidance (Story 3)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, /dso:brainstorm writes a sentinel file to a session-scoped path upon Phase 3 completion, with the write instruction added to Phase 3 steps in plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
  ← Satisfies: "Upon Phase 3 completion, /dso:brainstorm writes a sentinel file to a session-scoped path"
- When this story is complete, a PreToolUse hook blocks EnterPlanMode when no sentinel exists for the current session, returning a message directing the agent to invoke /dso:brainstorm first
  ← Satisfies: "A PreToolUse hook blocks EnterPlanMode when no brainstorm sentinel file exists"
- When this story is complete, the hook does NOT block EnterPlanMode when the brainstorm sentinel exists for the current session
  ← Satisfies: "The hook does NOT block EnterPlanMode when brainstorm has already completed"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Comprehensive test coverage for block/allow paths — sentinel present, sentinel absent, sentinel from wrong session
- [Reliability] Session-scoped path prevents cross-session contamination
- [Architecture] No EnterPlanMode PreToolUse matcher exists in plugin.json today. This story must register a new matcher entry and create a corresponding dispatcher (e.g., pre-enterplanmode.sh), following the pattern of the existing ExitPlanMode dispatcher (pre-exitplanmode.sh)
- [Reliability] Verify that CLAUDE_SESSION_ID (or equivalent) is available in both the brainstorm skill execution context (writer) and the PreToolUse hook execution context (reader). The existing plan-review-gate uses get_artifacts_dir() from deps.sh for session-scoped state files — consider using the same artifacts_dir pattern for consistency
- [Architecture] The new EnterPlanMode brainstorm gate and existing ExitPlanMode plan-review-gate form a two-gate corridor around plan mode. Coordinate naming conventions in session-misc-functions.sh and ensure sentinel file naming does not collide with the existing plan-review-status file in the artifacts directory
